body: In #1315, I realized that throwing a warning in `enable_threading` could be bad if it's for some reason called many times. So, I'm changing it in this PR to a new "deprecated" function. This PR also bumps the patch version for a new release.
title: Properly deprecate `enable_threading`, bump patch version

body: I'm afraid I find review dog to be really noisy. It can basically ruin the landing page of PRs if someone forgets to format before pushing / forgetting to start with a draft PR (e.g., #887). Am I alone? 🐶
title: Remove reviewdog
